title: sched_getaffinity does not exist on MacOS
body:
```bash
Traceback (most recent call last):
  File "/Users/foobar/git/verilator/test_regress/./driver.py", line 2959, in <module>
    Args.jobs = 1 if Args.interactive_debugger else calc_jobs()
  File "/Users/foobar/git/verilator/test_regress/./driver.py", line 2737, in calc_jobs
    ok_threads = max_procs()
  File "/Users/foobar/git/verilator/test_regress/./driver.py", line 2769, in max_procs
    procs = len(os.sched_getaffinity(0))
AttributeError: module 'os' has no attribute 'sched_getaffinity'
```
